rows.serviceDescription: I have a deck- Ballwin-Manchester area… Several boards are rotted, and several posts are rotted and need replacement. The covered part of the deck also has screens that need replacement as the splines are old and need to be replaced.
Several of the steps are rotten, hand rail is too flimsy

There are two windows on the second floor that I believe are leaking water into the walls and collecting in the ceiling on the first floor. I'd like to get them checked out and resealed or replaced if needed.
Deck needs repair/restoration: several boards need replaced, reinforcement for rails, sanding, stain or paint
Two holes in the drywall that need repair. They are also on a textured wall so patch and textured?
I have a 100 year old house,  I want french doors installed between living Room and hall, and dinning room and hall.  I believe there used to be doors there at one time.
I need to install 7 wired smoke detectors
Large crack in my drywall ceiling in sun room.

I manage the Archview Condominiums in Collinsville, and Rapid Repair Pro did some work on the dormers of the buildings a couple of years ago.  There are two buildings that have gotten some holes in them, and critters are getting inside units.  Would you be able to repair those?
I need a 40 amp circuit with 45-50ft of 6 gauge copper wire and a 240V NEMA circuit installed.
Bathroom remodel with tile and floor work. Plumbing remains where it is.
I've got deck repair, drywall repair and door replacement work.
Trim board above garage doors rotten & needs replaced.
Raccoon proofing attic.
I have a cracked door and I want it be filled and painted.
Some of my outlets don’t work
Need value replaced and check on leak Sink to drain
The wind pulled my storm door back and now it will not close correctly. Looking for a quote. Email will be better for me.

I can respond via Text Message or Email all day. I would need a heads'up for a call.
